summary: Iteration 14 - All new features verified. Backend 8/8 passed: POST /api/places/search {category:food,cuisines:['Gluten Free'],zip_code:'10001'} returns source='google' with real results; POST /api/sponsorship-requests with valid business_name+contact_email returns {ok:true,id:...}; invalid email returns 422; POST /api/places/search with lat/lng returns source='google'; sanity endpoints (/restaurants, /cuisines, /spin, /reports) all pass. Frontend verified live on preview URL: ad-unit renders on landing before any spin; footer feedback-link href='mailto:stevelammerts@gmail.com?subject=Fork%C2%B7Fate%20App%20Improvement...' and request-sponsorship-link href='mailto:stevelammerts@gmail.com?subject=Fork%C2%B7Fate%20Sponsorship...'; download-app-button + use-my-location-button + open-add-restaurant-button present; Gluten Free cuisine chip present in Food tab; full spin flow with ZIP 10001 + Gluten Free chip -> spin-result-card 'Wild' with real address 535 Hudson St, all action buttons (DoorDash, Order, Reviews, Spin again, Share your fate, Clear, report link); alternatives-section shows 5 items, clicking swaps result (Wild -> Friedman's); mode switching food->desserts clears result and swaps chips (Ice Cream chip appears); Add spot dialog opens successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Response key inconsistency: /api/places/search returns 'restaurants' key, but naming suggests 'results' would be clearer / more idiomatic for a search endpoint. Minor.
Home.jsx still ~608 lines - splitting recommended (carried from iter13).
google_places_search still does not check response.status_code before .json() (carried from iter13).
Frontend axios calls lack timeout (carried from iter13).
seed_data_creation: 1 TEST_iter14 sponsorship request + 1 TEST_iter14 report via POST endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Response payload from /api/places/search uses key 'restaurants' (not 'results'). Gluten Free cuisine works end-to-end with Google Places for ZIP 10001. Sponsorship endpoint /api/sponsorship-requests still exists and works even though frontend now uses mailto instead. All iteration_14 features passing.
